name: GoDoxy
description: GoDoxy Agent is a lightweight system agent that connects Proxmox nodes and LXC containers to a GoDoxy main server, enabling automatic route binding, LXC lifecycle control, and real-time log streaming.

notes.text: This installs the GoDoxy Agent only. A running GoDoxy main server is required to connect to.
After install, set AGENT_PORT and configure AGENT_CA_CERT / AGENT_SSL_CERT in /etc/godoxy-agent.env using certs generated by your GoDoxy main server.
